title: FINGERINSPIRE Clear Acrylic Display Case with Black Base & 4 Pcs Rubber Rings 16x16x15cm Cube Clear Self-Assembly Acrylic Box Dustproof Protection Showcase for Action Figures Collectibles Toys
features: 【Package & Size】: You will receive 5 pieces of clear acrylic panels and 1 piece of black bottom base, with 4 pieces of rubber rings for easy fixing, making it less likely to come loose; assembled size is about: 160x160x155mm.

【High Quality Material】:Our boxes are made of high quality acrylic material, and each acrylic plate is covered with a protective film, placed in the process of transport scratch or damage; all edges and corners are perfectly polished, no residue and burrs.

【Easy to Assemble】:Our acrylic panels are reserved for installation holes, please tear off the protective film first when using, you can follow our pictures to install them, they are put into the base with the included collar to fix it, just a few steps to easily assemble into an acrylic box.

【High Transparency】:2mm thick acrylic plate and cover has 98% light transmission, high optical clarity, all edges are not yellow, no distorted vision of the items you display, you can view the display very intuitively.

【Wide Range of Applications】:Ideal for stores to display art materials, collectibles, characters, dolls, handicrafts, jewelry, etc.; protective boxes can also play a good role in protecting, isolating dust and water vapor to prevent damage to the display.
description: Product Description FINGERINSPIRE Acrylic Box Clear Acrylic Display Cases for Collectibles, Self-Assembly Dustproof Countertop Box for Toys Features: Specification: Material: Acrylic Color: Clear Shape: Square/Rectangle Clear Acrylic Display Case: this acrylic display case has high transparency and is not easy to be deformed, which allows us to better enjoy our exhibits. Versatile & Various Size: Various sizes are perfect for displaying baseball, football, basketball, model cars, collectible figures, tabletop miniatures, collectible figures, dolls, toys, objects of art, artworks, souvenirs, antiques, jewellery, active figures, sports memorabilia, etc. Easy to Assemble: You just connect the sides, top and head. The edges are smooth and the acrylic case fitting perfectly against the base. PVC and acid free. The plastic is sturdy and durable, easily cleaned. It's well balanced and solid, not easily knocked over.
